song.title: In His Time
song.lyrics:
[V1] .C G C In His time, in His time, . F C C7 He makes all things beautiful in His time. . F G Lord, please show me every day, . C Am As You’re teaching me Your way, . F G That You do just what You say, . C In Your time.
[V2] In Your time, in Your time, You make all things beautiful, in Your time. Lord, my life to You I bring. May each song I have to sing, Be to You a lovely thing, In Your time.
